ksa_text: Ability to develop measurement and monitoring strategies, metrics, and procedures for tracking organizational compliance and risk status.

dcwf.top_element_label: Facilitate implementation of new or revised laws, regulations, executive orders, policies, standards, or procedures.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of Risk Adaptive (Adaptable) Access Controls (RAdAC)

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Facilitate implementation of new or revised laws, regulations, executive orders, policies, standards, or procedures.
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Regulatory Compliance KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.45) to justify inclusion for the Data and AI Transformation Lead. Without stronger framework alignment, this ability KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain ability KSA be expected in real-world Data and AI Transformation Lead roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Regulatory Compliance is not a standard competency expectation for Data and AI Transformation Lead. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Data and AI Transformation Lead competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.45) and edge-domain placement (Regulatory Compliance) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Data and AI Transformation Lead. All passes support exclusion.
